slides.title: For a long life, *less alcohol* is better.
slides.sub: The old story about a daily glass has weakened. Here is a calm way to rethink it.

slides.title: The old story weakened
slides.body: The classic 'a glass of red is good for you' line *has not held up*. For longevity, less now looks better.

slides.title: It touches a lot
slides.body: Alcohol can affect sleep, blood pressure and *long-term risk*. The effects build quietly over many years.

slides.title: It steals deep sleep
slides.body: Even a small amount *disrupts your deep sleep*. You may fall asleep faster but recover far less overnight.

slides.title: You don't have to quit
slides.body: Fewer drinks and *more alcohol-free days* both help. Small, steady changes move the needle over time.

slides.title: Track it honestly
slides.body: Writing it down *shows you the pattern*. Honest tracking, not guilt, is what makes the shift stick.

slides.title: See the patterns that *shape your years*.
slides.body: Vibe Health turns your sleep, habits and recovery into one daily score, so honest patterns are easy to spot.
slides.cta_text: search ‘Vibe Health’ on the App Store

caption:
The old 'a glass of red is good for you' story has weakened. For longevity, less alcohol is better. 🍷

It affects sleep, blood pressure and long-term risk, and it steals deep sleep even in small amounts. You don't have to quit: fewer drinks and more alcohol-free days help. 🔖

Vibe Health turns your habits into one honest score → link in bio.
youtube_title: Rethinking Alcohol for a Longer, Healthier Life
